text: You don't rise to the level of your goals, you fall to the level of your systems.
author: Unknown

text: Uneven stitches still hold the fabric together.
author: Folk saying

text: A lantern that never goes out is just a lantern that was never afraid of the dark.
author: Luna, The Lantern Maker
老子 (Laozi)
language: Chinese — A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step

author: Chinese proverb
language: Chinese — Live to old age, learn to old age

text: Was du heute kannst besorgen, das verschiebe nicht auf morgen.
author: German proverb
language: German — Don't put off until tomorrow what you can do today

text: The rule you're memorizing today is scaffolding. At some point, the scaffolding comes down.
author: Luna
Chinese proverb
language: Chinese — Don't fear going slowly, only fear standing still

text: Language is the road map of a culture.
author: Rita Mae Brown

text: A path is worn into grass the same way a character is worn into memory: slowly, and without anyone watching it happen.
author: Luna

text: You don't need a secret method. You need consistency you can sustain for a year.
author: Luna
